name: mcp-stash
description: Claude plugins for consulting client automations, each bundling a local FastMCP server (and Skills) as a one-command install.

plugins.name: iphone
plugins.description: Read (and send) iMessage history, read Mac/iPhone call history (cellular + FaceTime), and look up Contacts — all locally on this Mac. macOS only; requires Full Disk Access.

plugins.name: career-navigator
plugins.description: Conversational career exploration for a high school student: infers a RIASEC (Holland Code) profile through natural conversation, then matches it against a local O*NET occupational dataset. Fully local — no accounts, no hosting, no network calls at runtime.
